decisions.decision: Workspace creation uses explicit transaction + SET LOCAL app.current_tenant
decisions.rationale: Single SaveChangesAsync caused FK violation (wrong insert order) and RLS block (no tenant context). Two saves with SET LOCAL fixes both atomically.

decisions.decision: PR branch 'master-pr' created from a5ffc6f with 5 code commits only
decisions.rationale: All work on master; master-pr filters out planning-only commits for clean PR diff

next_action: Run dotnet tests to confirm 26/26 pass, then update VERIFICATION.md to passed and mark Phase 01 complete
context_notes: Phase 01 all 3 plans built and human-verified E2E. Code review found 4 critical issues. The FK bug in workspace creation was the only test failure root cause (all 17 failures trace to POST /workspaces → SaveChangesAsync order). Fix is committed. VERIFICATION.md exists but status=human_needed pending test confirmation.
